description: Representative sample fight-end data for Smart Robot prompt validation (issue #3). Uses the oak tree Memory from the live fight box placeholder UI (box/src/index.html) as reference for constructing realistic final Fuzz + Fresh Clues. This is the exact shape of data the box will send at end of Endless Fight: only final Fuzz + Fresh Clues records (spot/position, words, Fuzz Level). Used exclusively for dev prompt engineering and sample capture. Originally tested on Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (see ADR-0002). Never sent to or captured from production nvidia-l4. References: PRD #1 (data contract), issue #3, CONTEXT.md, ADR-0001.
original_memory_for_reference_only: The old oak tree by the river had stood for centuries. Its roots drank from the slow stream that wound through the valley like a silver thread. Birds nested in its high branches and children played under its shade in summer. Every autumn its leaves turned the color of fire before they fell.
